creator: webmaster@kibab.com
text:
What happens with qutim-jabber and qutim-icq ports?
Shouldn't they also be updated?

On 13.06.12 13:44 , Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of net-im/qutim,
>
> Please note that PR ports/169032 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/169032
>

-- 
Regards,
Ilya Bakulin

xmpp://kibab612@jabber.ru
